name: Longitudinal CT
short_description: Longitudinal-CT is a publicly available longitudinal whole-body CT dataset of 300 melanoma patients, each with baseline and follow-up imaging for therapy response assessment. It provides anonymized NIfTI CT scans, manual tumor segmentation masks, lesion center coordinates, and lesion-level metadata including location, volume, topology changes, and lesion linking across timepoints. The dataset is designed for AI research on longitudinal lesion detection, segmentation, tracking, and therapy-response analysis in oncology.
scanner_type: Siemens CT (Sensation 64, SOMATOM Definition AS/Flash/Force, Biograph128)
original_authors: Küstner, Thomas, Peisen, Felix, Gatidis, Sergios, Wagner, Andreas, Megne, Ornela, Othman, Ahmed, Sanner, Antoine, Loßau, Tanja, Moltz, Jan Hendrik, Kohlbrandt, Temke, Hering, Alessa
